description: Parse one document/PDF to layout-preserved text or structured bbox JSON via the liteparse engine (lit parse).
rules: read-only — never mutates the input file
FORMAT is 'text' (layout-preserved) or 'json' (per-page text_items with bounding boxes)
all processing is local; no cloud API or network call
output written under record_store as parse.<txt|json>
usage: Set INPUT_FILE (a PDF or convertible document) and FORMAT (text|json). Output: parse.txt or parse.json.
limitation: Requires the liteparse package (PyPI liteparse==2.0.0) at runtime; when absent the porter writes a graceful placeholder so the contract still holds. Office/image inputs additionally need LibreOffice/ImageMagick.
